'''[[General/Legends|General]] Odosk''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] who served in [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] fleet. An [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], he was about to retire when Daala and [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] offered him a promotion and a place in the [[Maw Installation]]. He was well beyond retirement age by the time Daala finally left the Maw.

{{Char-stub}}
